common.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
common.comingSoon: This feature is not yet available.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

deny.title: Access Denied
deny.accountInactive: Your account has been suspended or disabled. Please contact an administrator.
deny.noAccess: You do not have access to any customer workspace. Please request an invitation from a manager.
deny.genericError: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
deny.adminMfaRequired: Multi-factor authentication is required for System Admin access. Please configure TOTP or WebAuthn.
deny.adminAuthTooOld: Your authentication has expired. System Admin sign-in must be completed within 5 minutes.
deny.adminRoleMissing: You do not have the System Admin role. Contact an administrator to request access.
deny.adminNotEligible: Your account is not eligible for System Admin access.
deny.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired or is no longer valid. Please request a new invitation.
deny.invitationEmailMismatch: The email address you signed in with does not match the invited email. Please sign in with the correct account.
deny.invitationEmailNotVerified: Your email address has not been verified. Please verify your email before accepting the invitation.
deny.bridgeExpired: The bridge connection has expired or was already used. Please initiate a new connection from AICE.
deny.bridgeCustomerMismatch: The requested customers could not be matched. Please verify the customer configuration in AICE.
deny.bridgeCustomerInactive: One or more requested customers are inactive. Please contact an administrator.
deny.bridgeEnvironmentInactive: The AICE environment is inactive. Please contact an administrator.
deny.bridgeNoAccess: You do not have access to the requested customers. Please request access from a manager.
deny.contactAdmin: If you believe this is an error, please contact your system administrator.

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage members and invitations for your organization.
members.name: Name
members.lastManagerTooltip: This member is the only Manager. Their role cannot be changed and they cannot be removed.
members.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this organization? This action cannot be undone.
members.inviteDescription: Send an invitation email to add a new member.
members.inviteAlreadyMember: This email is already a member of the organization.
members.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {email}?
members.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
members.lastManagerError: Cannot remove or demote the last Manager.
members.noCustomerAccess: No customer access. Please request an invitation from a manager.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Search and filter system audit logs.
auditLogs.errorLoading: Failed to load audit logs. Please try again.

suspiciousActivity.title: Suspicious Activity
suspiciousActivity.description: Detected suspicious patterns in system activity.
suspiciousActivity.errorLoading: Failed to load alerts. Please try again.

adminAccounts.title: Accounts
adminAccounts.description: Manage system accounts and their status.
adminAccounts.suspendConfirm: Are you sure you want to suspend {name}? All active sessions will be terminated immediately.
adminAccounts.unsuspendConfirm: Are you sure you want to unsuspend {name}? The account will be able to sign in again.
adminAccounts.actionError: Failed to update account status. Please try again.
adminAccounts.errorLoading: Failed to load accounts. Please try again.

adminCustomers.title: Customers
adminCustomers.description: Manage customers and their database provisioning status.
adminCustomers.name: Name
adminCustomers.createDescription: Create a new customer with a dedicated database.
adminCustomers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will permanently remove the customer, its database, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
adminCustomers.errorLoading: Failed to load customers. Please try again.
adminCustomers.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.

adminEnvironments.title: Environments
adminEnvironments.description: Manage AICE environments, customer mappings, and trust registry keys.
adminEnvironments.name: Name
adminEnvironments.createDescription: Register a new AICE environment. Optionally include a trust registry key.
adminEnvironments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All customer mappings and trust registry keys will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
adminEnvironments.errorLoading: Failed to load environments. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.linkCustomerDescription: Add a customer to this environment.
adminEnvironments.noLinkedCustomers: No customers linked to this environment.
adminEnvironments.registerKeyDescription: Register a new public key for this environment.
adminEnvironments.removeKeyConfirm: Remove key {kid} from issuer {issuer}? This action cannot be undone.
adminEnvironments.noKeys: No trust registry keys for this environment.
adminEnvironments.aiceIdConflict: An environment with this AICE ID already exists.
adminEnvironments.invalidPublicKey: Invalid JWK JSON. Please check the format.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintInstruction: Compare these values out-of-band against the thumbprint shown on aice-web-next. The base64url form is canonical; the hex form is provided as a visual aid.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintError: Failed to compute thumbprint. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintConfirm: I confirmed the thumbprint matches the value shown on aice-web-next.

adminAdmins.title: System Admins
adminAdmins.description: Designate or revoke System Admin privileges. Maximum {max} admins allowed.
adminAdmins.designateDescription: Select an account to designate as System Admin. The account will receive the aimer_admin Keycloak realm role and admin portal access.
adminAdmins.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke admin privileges from {name}? All admin sessions will be terminated immediately.
adminAdmins.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminAdmins.alreadyAdmin: This account is already an admin.
adminAdmins.errorLoading: Failed to load admins. Please try again.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
